sourceTitle: Appropriate Use of AI Services & U-M Policy
evidenceSnippetOriginal: When using AI services for teaching, learning and knowledge production, U-M community members must: Align with the university's principles for honesty, candor, openness, and integrity in scholarship and research, including appropriate disclosure and citation where AI has been used.
evidenceLocator: For Teaching, Learning, and Knowledge Production section
